intentSynonyms: search and list issues with optional filters in sentry
description: Search and list issues for a Sentry organization. Supports Sentry search syntax in the query parameter (e.g., "is:unresolved", "assigned:me", "level:error", "first-seen:-24h"). Filter by project IDs, environment, and time range. Results are paginated with a cursor.

query.description: Search query using Sentry search syntax (e.g., "is:unresolved", "assigned:me", "level:error"). Defaults to "is:unresolved"

project.description: Array of project IDs to filter by. Omit to search all projects

limit.description: Maximum number of issues to return (default 25, max 100)

cursor.description: Pagination cursor from a previous response
